author: CFenner
text: Show active preset on climate entity

author: CFenner
text:
### Checklist

* I have updated to the latest available Home Assistant version.
* I have cleared the cache of my browser.
* I have tried a different browser to see if it is related to my browser.

### Describe the issue you are experiencing

The climate entity displays the active preset in the device view:  
[![Bildschirmfoto 2023-12-13 um 11 19 04](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/9592452/290157116-f82010bc-f447-4dc4-9acf-e3da3e750bd1.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BS48IEwVhrucvN1XdRZTRosFfPe9uDPJIqjLT6biE2Y)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/9592452/290157116-f82010bc-f447-4dc4-9acf-e3da3e750bd1.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..BS48IEwVhrucvN1XdRZTRosFfPe9uDPJIqjLT6biE2Y)

This is missing in the tile cards and in the climate card. One can add this with a feature, but that is not always sufficient.

In ViCare integration, the heating has presets that are controlled by a schedule and are not allowed to set manual. In this case it would be nice to see the current active preset without being able to select/activate the one.

### Describe the behavior you expected

I would like to see the active preset somewhere, be it on the feature (non selectable option) or on the entity itself.
